_comment: LLM provider registry. Each provider maps to a response 'family' (the wire format the wiki knows how to build requests for and parse). Adding a new provider variant — e.g. a different endpoint that speaks one of the known families — is a JSON edit here, no code change. The three families (anthropic, openai-chat, openai-responses) are implemented in code (ai_core.php); only add a new 'family' value if you also add its parser. Fields: id (stored in each AI user's config), label (shown in Admin - AI - Provider), family, default_url (used when an AI user leaves the API URL blank).

providers.label: OpenAI / compatible — Chat Completions (OpenAI, OpenRouter, Groq, Ollama, …)
